brand.name: Medhen
brand.tagline: Motor cover from quote to claim — bilingual, Telebirr-ready, built for EIC.

admin.title: Platform administration
admin.subtitle: Manage users, products, and tenant configuration.
admin.subject: Subject

finance.title: Finance & billing
finance.subtitle: Written premium, claims paid, and reconciliation for the tenant.

feature.stpBody: Rule-based decisions auto-accept, refer, or decline in milliseconds.
feature.moneyBody: VAT + stamp duty with banker's rounding — never floating-point money.
feature.auditBody: Every state change is recorded — regulator-ready from day one.
feature.telebirrBody: HMAC-verified callbacks settle invoices automatically and safely.
feature.bilingualBody: Amharic and English across every screen, document, and QR sticker.
feature.kpiBody: Loss & combined ratios projected live from the event stream.

auth.title: Sign in to Medhen
auth.subtitle: EIC portal — secured by Keycloak
auth.notice: You will be redirected to the EIC identity provider.
auth.expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.idleBody: You will be signed out in {seconds}s due to inactivity.
auth.forgotHint: You can reset it on the sign-in screen.
auth.stepUpBody: High-value settlements require you to re-authenticate.

quote.title: Motor quote
quote.identitySub: Register the insured party to begin the quotation.
quote.assetSub: Describe the vehicle you want to insure.
quote.issuedSub: An invoice has been raised — settle it via Telebirr to activate cover.

servicing.title: Servicing
servicing.cancelWarning: This cancels cover. A pro-rata refund is estimated from the remaining term.

claim.title: First notice of loss
claim.subtitle: Report a loss with location and estimate — routed to fast-track when under authority.

staff.title: Operations dashboard
staff.subtitle: Real-time production KPIs and the immutable audit trail.
staff.auditSub: Most recent domain events across every module.

errors.400: The request was invalid. Please review the details and try again.
errors.401: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
errors.403: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.404: The requested record could not be found.
errors.409: This action conflicts with the current state (it may already be processed or require manual review).
errors.422: The request could not be processed. Please check the values and try again.
errors.500: The service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again shortly.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for doesn’t exist or has moved.
errors.boundaryBody: An unexpected error occurred. You can try again.
errors.forbiddenBody: Your account doesn’t have permission to view this area. Switch to a portal available to your role.
